message:
bd-hziq: Add interactive key handling for demo_showcase

Adds a keys module that provides non-blocking keyboard input handling:
- 'q', 'Q', Escape, or Ctrl+C to quit early
- 'p', 'P', or Space to pause (prepared for future use)
- Only active in TTY mode (no-op when piped)
- Non-blocking polling with 10ms timeout

Integrates quit detection into the pipeline simulation loop,
allowing users to cancel a running demo by pressing 'q'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
